title: The Eco-Friendly Rug Pull
relevance_summary: Hidden mint function exploited for rug pull on a supposedly private blockchain

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints large amounts of tokens from a contract with no prior history

red_flags: private blockchain with exposed RPC endpoints
summary: Rowan Energy used a hidden mint function in a private blockchain to execute a rug pull, exploiting the lack of transparency and security measures.
